name: Mox / Novamox
source_note: Data compiled for Arogya knowledge base. Verify against 1mg.com and pharmeasy.in for live updates.
uses: H. pylori eradication (with clarithromycin and PPI)
how_it_works: Broad-spectrum aminopenicillin antibiotic that inhibits bacterial cell wall synthesis by binding penicillin-binding proteins.
food_interactions: Can be taken with or without food
what_to_avoid: Report rash immediately — can indicate allergy
storage: Store below 25°C, oral suspension refrigerate and discard after 7 days
